\tzpentry{ID4937}{Address Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4937 introduces Address Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \pi_{\text{address}}(a, b) = \frac{1}{2}(a+b)(a+b+1) + b \pmod{153,600} \end{equation}
